name: Orange Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except egg yolks in a double boiler.
2. Cook for 5-8 minutes, or until smooth.
3. Beat the egg yolks slightly and gradually dilute with some of the hot mixture.
4. When eggs are thoroughly diluted and all danger of curdling is past, add them to the double boiler mixture.
5. Cook and stir for about 5 more minutes.
6. Cool the custard completely.
7. Pour into baked pie shell.
8. Top with fresh or canned orange segments (remove membranes if using fresh oranges).
9. Make meringue from beaten egg whites, a pinch of salt, and 6 tablespoons sugar.
10. Beat until stiff peaks form.
11. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes, or until the meringue is delicately brown.
Good Luck and Enjoy. Joni in S. Jersey
